questions.title: East to East (Cairo to Dhaka)
questions.question: Cairo is 30°E. Dhaka is 90°E. If it is 10:00 AM in Cairo, what time is it in Dhaka?
questions.explanation:
Step 1: Both are East. Subtract degrees: 90° - 30° = 60°.
Step 2: 60 ÷ 15 = 4 Hours.
Step 3: Dhaka is ahead. 10:00 + 4 = 14:00 (2:00 PM).
